items.visual_description: A dark red, possibly burgundy, camisole top made of a stretchy, flowy fabric. It features a sweetheart neckline with delicate lace-like trim, sheer flutter cap sleeves, and a ruched bust. The body drapes down to a layered, asymmetrical ruffled hem with a lettuce-edge finish.
A pair of dark blue wash denim jeans. Only the high-waisted portion is visible, showing the waistband and top of the front.
A black double-stranded necklace, styled like a choker. The strands are made of small black beads or a fine chain. A small, ornate black cross pendant hangs from the lower strand in the center.

overall_description: A mannequin styled in a romantic goth or Y2K-inspired outfit. The look consists of a dark red, flowy camisole top with flutter sleeves and a ruffled hem, paired with dark blue jeans and a black, double-stranded cross necklace.
